144.3: Great is our Lord and exceeding laudable, and of his greatness there is no end.
144.4: Generation and generation shall praise thy works: and they shall pronounce thy power.
144.5: They shall speak the magnificence of the glory of thy holiness: and shall tell thy marvelous works.
144.6: And they shall tell the force of thy terrible things: and shall declare thy greatness:
144.7: They shall utter the memory of the aboundance of thy sweetness: and in thy justice they shall rejoice.
144.8: Our Lord is pitiful and merciful: patient and very merciful.
144.9: Our Lord is sweet to all: and his commiserations are over all his works.
144.10: Let all thy works, o Lord, confess to thee: and let thy Saints bless thee.
144.11: They shall tell the glory of thy kingdom: and shall speak thy might.
144.12: That they may make thy might known to the children of men: and the glory of the magnificence of thy kingdom.
144.13: Thy kingdom is a kingdom of all worlds: and thy dominion in all generation and generation. Our Lord is faithful in all his words, and holy in all his works.
144.14: Our Lord lifteth up all that fall: and setteth up all that are bruised.
144.15: The eyes of all hope in thee, o Lord: and thou givest their meat in time convenient.
144.16: Thou openest thy hand: and fillest every living creature with blessing.
144.17: Our Lord is just in all his ways: and holy in all his works.
144.18: Our Lord is near to all that invocate him: to all that invocate him in truth.
144.19: He will do the will of them that fear him, and will hear their prayer, and save them.
144.20: Our Lord keepeth all that love him: and he will destroy all sinners.
144.21: My mouth shall speak the praise of our Lord: and let all flesh bless his holy name for ever, and for ever and ever.

145.2: My soul praise thou our Lord, I will praise our Lord in my life: I will sing to my God as long as I shall be. Put not confidence in Princes:
145.3: in the sons of men: in whom there is no salvation.
145.4: His spirit shall go forth, and he shall return into his earth: in that day all their cogitations shall perish.
145.5: Blessed is he, whose helper is the God of Jacob, his hope in our Lord his God:
145.6: who made heaven and earth, the sea, and all things that are in them.
145.7: Which keepeth truth for ever, doth judgment for them that suffer wrong: giveth food to the hungry. Our Lord looseth the fettered:
145.8: our Lord illuminateth the blind. Our Lord lifteth up the bruised, our Lord loveth the just.
145.9: Our Lord keepeth strangers, the pupil and widow he will receive: and the ways of sinners he will destroy.
145.10: Our Lord will reign for ever thy God, o Sion in generation & generation.

146.1: Alleluia. Praise ye our Lord because Psalm is good: to our God let there be pleasant and comely praise.
146.2: Our Lord building up Jerusalem: will gather together the dispersions of Israel.
146.3: Who healeth the contrite of heart: and bindeth up their sores.
146.4: Who numbereth the multitude of stars: & giveth names to them all.
146.5: Great is our Lord, and great is his strength: and of his wisdom there is no number.
146.6: Our Lord receiving the meek: & humbling sinners even to the ground.
146.7: Sing ye to our Lord in confession: sing ye to our God on harp.
146.8: Who covereth the heaven with clouds: and prepareth rain for the earth. Who bringeth forth grass in the mountains: and herb for the service of men.
146.9: Who giveth to beasts their food: and to the young ravens that call upon him.
146.10: He shall not have pleasure in the strength of an horse: nor in the legs of a man shall he be well pleased.
146.11: Our Lord is well pleased toward them that fear him: and in them that hope upon his mercy.

147.1: Alleluia. O Jerusalem praise our Lord: praise thy God, o Sion.
147.2: Because he hath strengthened the locks of thy gates: he hath blessed thy children in thee.
147.3: Who hath set thy borders peace: and filleth thee with the fat of corn.
147.4: Who sendeth forth his speech to the earth: his word runneth swiftly.
147.5: Who giveth snow as wool: scattereth mist as ashes.
147.6: He casteth his crystal as morsels: before the face of his cold who shall endure?
147.7: He shall send forth his word, and shall melt them: his spirit shall blow, and waters shall flow.
147.8: Who declareth his word to Jacob: his justices and judgments to Israel.
147.9: He hath not done in like manner to any nation: and his judgements he hath not made manifest to them. Alleluia.

148.1: Alleluia. Praise ye our Lord from the heavens: praise ye him in the high places.
148.2: Praise ye him all his Angels: praise ye him all his hosts:
148.3: Praise ye him sun and moon: praise him all ye stars, and light.
148.4: Praise him ye heavens of heavens: and the waters that are above the heavens,
148.5: let them praise the name of our Lord. Because he said, and they were made: he commanded, and they were created.
148.6: He established them for ever, and for ever and ever: he put a precept, and it shall not pass.
148.7: Praise our Lord from the earth: ye dragons, and all depths.
148.8: Fire, hail, snow, ice, spirit of storms: which do his word:
148.9: Mountains, and all little hills: trees that bear fruit, and all cedars.
148.10: Beasts, and all cattle: serpents, and feathered fowls:
148.11: Kings of the earth, & all peoples: Princes, and all judges of the earth.
148.12: Young men and virgins: old with young let them praise the name of our Lord:
148.13: because the name of him alone is exalted.
148.14: The confession of him above heaven and earth: and he hath exalted the horn of his people. An hymn to all his saints: to the children of Israel a people approaching unto him. Alleluia.

149.1: Alleluia. Sing ye to our Lord a new song: let his praise be in the Church of saints.
149.2: Let Israel be joyful in him, that made him: and let the children of Sion rejoice in their King.
149.3: Let them praise his name in choir: on timbrel and psalter let them sing to him.
149.4: Because our Lord is well pleased in his people: and he will exalt the meek unto salvation.
149.5: The saints shall rejoice in glory: they shall be joyful in their beds.
149.6: The exaltations of God in their throat: and two edged swords in their hands.
149.7: To do revenge in the nations: chastisements among the peoples.
149.8: To bind their kings in fetters: and their nobles in iron manacles.
149.9: That they may do in them the judgement that is written: this glory is to all his saints. Alleluia.

150.1: Alleluia. Praise ye our Lord in his holies: praise ye him in the firmament of his strength.
150.2: Praise ye him in his powers: praise ye him according to the multitude of his greatness.
150.3: Praise ye him in the sound of trumpet: praise ye him on psalter and harp.
150.4: Praise ye him on timbrel and choir: praise ye him on strings and organ.
150.5: Praise ye him on well sounding cymbals: praise ye him on cymbals of jubilation:
150.6: let every spirit praise our Lord. Alleluia.
